title: EBS Optimization Enabled
description: Checks whether EBS optimization is enabled for your EC2 instances that can be EBS-optimized

title: EBS Volume Encryption Key Required
description: EBS Volume should specify a KmsKeyId value

title: EC2 Detailed Monitoring Enabled
description: Checks if detailed monitoring is enabled for EC2 instances.

title: EC2 Instance Public IP Disabled
description: Checks whether Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) instances have a public IP association.

title: EC2 Instance Profile Attached
description: Checks if an Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) instance has an Identity and Access Management (IAM) profile attached to it.

title: EC2 Instances in VPC
description: Checks if your EC2 instances belong to a virtual private cloud (VPC).

title: Network ACL Effective Deny Rules
description: NetworkACL Entry Deny rules should affect all CIDR ranges.

title: Network ACL Port Range Restricted
description: TCP/UDP protocol NetworkACL entries possibly should not allow all ports.

title: Network ACL Protocol Restricted
description: To avoid opening all ports for Allow rules, EC2 NetworkACL Entry Protocol should be either 6 (for TCP), 17 (for UDP), 1 (for ICMP), or 58 (for ICMPv6, which must include an IPv6 CIDR block, ICMP type, and code).

title: Security Group Egress Not Open to World
description: Check if cidr FOR ipv4 and ipv6 on security group egress is open or private.

title: Security Group Ingress Not Open to World
description: Check if cidr FOR ipv4 and ipv6 on security group ingress is open or private.

title: EBS Volumes Encrypted
description: Checks if the EBS volumes that are in an attached state are encrypted.

title: No Unrestricted Routes to Internet Gateway
description: Checks if there are public routes in the route table to an Internet Gateway (IGW).

title: Restricted Incoming Traffic
description: Checks if the security groups in use do not allow unrestricted incoming TCP traffic to the specified ports.

title: SSH Access Disabled
description: Checks if the incoming SSH traffic for the security groups is accessible.

title: Security Group Rules Have Descriptions
description: Security group rules without a description obscure their purpose and may lead to bad practices in ensuring they only allow traffic from the ports and sources/destinations required.

title: Security Group Egress Protocol Restricted
description: Check if Security Groups found egress with IpProtocol of -1.

title: Security Group Egress Port Range Restricted
description: Check if Security Groups found egress with port range instead of just a single PORT

title: Security Group Ingress Protocol Restricted
description: Check if Security Groups found ingress has IpProtocol as -1

title: Security Group Ingress CIDR Restricted
description: Check if Security Groups found ingress cidr is not /32

title: Security Group Ingress Port Range Restricted
description: Check if Security Groups found ingress with port range instead of just a single PORT

title: Security Group Egress Rules Present
description: Missing egress rule means all traffic is allowed outbound. Make this explicit if it is desired configuration.

title: Subnet Auto-Assign Public IP Disabled
description: Checks if Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (Amazon VPC) subnets are assigned a public IP address.

title: Auto Scaling Group ELB Health Check Required
description: Checks whether your Auto Scaling groups that are associated with a load balancer are using Elastic Load Balancing health checks.

title: Auto Scaling Launch Config Public IP Disabled
description: Checks that Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling launch configurations are configured to not associate public IP addresses

title: ECS Task Definition User Check for Host Mode
description: Checks if an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task definition with host networking mode has 'privileged' or 'user' container definitions.

title: EFS Encryption Enabled
description: Checks if Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) is configured to encrypt the file data using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). The rule is NON_COMPLIANT if the encrypted key is set to false on DescribeFileSystems or if the KmsKeyId key on DescribeFileSystems does not match the KmsKeyId parameter.

title: EFS Resources Protected by Backup Plan
description: Checks if Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) File Systems are protected by a backup plan. The rule is NON_COMPLIANT if the EFS File System is not covered by a backup plan.

title: EKS Cluster Encryption Enabled
description: EKS Cluster EncryptionConfig Provider should specify KeyArn to enable Encryption.

title: EKS Public Access Endpoint Disabled
description: Checks whether Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) endpoint is not publicly accessible.

title: EMR Kerberos Authentication Enabled
description: Checks if Kerberos is set for EMR cluster.

title: EMR Security Configuration Enabled
description: EMR SecurityConfiguration should enable and properly configure encryption at rest and in transit.

title: FSx Resources Protected by Backup Plan
description: Checks if Amazon FSx File Systems are protected by a backup plan.

title: IoT Policy Wildcard Actions Restricted
description: IOT policy should not allow * action

title: IoT Policy Wildcard Resources Restricted
description: IOT policy should not allow * resource

title: Amazon MQ Broker Encryption Enabled
description: AmazonMQ Broker should specify EncryptionOptions

title: Amazon MQ Broker No Plaintext Passwords
description: Amazon MQ Broker Users password must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager/ssm-secure value. with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: Aurora MySQL Backtracking Enabled
description: Checks if an Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster has backtracking enabled.

title: RDS Database Instance Backup Enabled
description: Checks if RDS DB instances have backups enabled.

title: RDS Automatic Minor Version Upgrade Enabled
description: Checks whether storage encryption is enabled for your RDS DB instances

title: RDS Cluster Master User No Plaintext Password
description: RDS Cluster DB instance master user password must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager/ssm-secure value. with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: RDS Enhanced Monitoring Enabled
description: Checks whether enhanced monitoring is enabled for Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) instances.

title: RDS Instance Deletion Protection Enabled
description: Checks if an Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) instance has deletion protection enabled.

title: RDS Instance Public Access Disabled
description: Checks if an RDS instances has Publicly Accessible not set.

title: RDS Instance Logging Enabled
description: Checks if log types exported to Amazon CloudWatch for an Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) instance are enabled.

title: RDS Master User Name No Plaintext Password
description: RDS instance master user name must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager/ssm-secure value. with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: RDS Master User No Plaintext Password
description: RDS instance master user password must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager/ssm-secure value. with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: RDS Multi-AZ Support Enabled
description: In a Multi-AZ deployment, Amazon RDS automatically provisions and maintains a synchronous standby replica in a different Availability Zone.

title: RDS Storage Encryption Enabled
description: Checks whether storage encryption is enabled for your RDS DB instances.

title: Redshift Automated Snapshots Enabled
description: Checks that Amazon Redshift automated snapshots are enabled for clusters.

title: Redshift Cluster Configuration Check
description: Checks whether Amazon Redshift clusters have the specified settings (Encrypted Only)

title: Redshift Cluster Maintenance Settings Check
description: Checks whether Amazon Redshift clusters have the specified maintenance settings (AllowVersionUpgrade, PreferredMaintenanceWindow, AutomatedSnapshotRetentionPeriod)

title: Redshift Cluster Master User No Plaintext Password
description: Redshift Cluster master user password must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager/ssm-secure value. with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: Redshift Cluster Public Access Disabled
description: Redshift cluster should not be publicly accessible on the internet.

title: Redshift Enhanced VPC Routing Enabled
description: Checks if Amazon Redshift cluster has 'enhancedVpcRouting' enabled.

title: S3 Bucket Default Lock Enabled
description: Checks whether Amazon S3 bucket has lock enabled, by default

title: S3 Bucket Public Access Prohibited
description: Checks if Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3) buckets are publicly accessible.

title: S3 Bucket Logging Enabled
description: Checks whether logging is enabled for your S3 buckets.

title: S3 Bucket Policy No Allow Plus NotAction
description: Checks that SIMPLE STORAGE SERVICE (S3) TOPIC Policy do not use Allow+NotAction

title: S3 Bucket Policy No Wildcard Actions
description: S3 Bucket policy should not allow * action

title: S3 Bucket Policy No Wildcard Principals
description: S3 Bucket policy should not allow * principal

title: S3 Bucket Public Read ACL Disabled
description: Checks if Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3) buckets are publicly readable via the public ACL

title: S3 Bucket Public Read Prohibited
description: Checks if your Amazon S3 buckets do not allow public read access. The rule checks the Block Public Access settings, the bucket policy, and the bucket access control list (ACL).

title: S3 Bucket Public Read-Write ACL Disabled
description: Checks if Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3) buckets are publicly readable via the public ACL

title: S3 Bucket Public Write Prohibited
description: Checks if your Amazon S3 buckets do not allow public write access. The rule checks the Block Public Access settings, the bucket policy, and the bucket access control list (ACL).

title: S3 Bucket Replication Enabled
description: Checks whether the Amazon S3 buckets have cross-region replication enabled.

title: S3 Bucket Server-Side Encryption Enabled
description: Checks if your Amazon S3 bucket either has the Amazon S3 default encryption enabled or that the Amazon S3 bucket policy explicitly denies put-object requests without server side encryption that uses AES-256 or AWS Key Management Service.

title: S3 Bucket SSL Requests Only
description: Checks if Amazon S3 buckets have policies that require requests to use Secure Socket Layer (SSL).

title: S3 Bucket Versioning Enabled
description: Checks if versioning is enabled for your S3 buckets.

title: S3 Bucket Policy No Allow Plus NotPrincipal
description: Checks that Amazon S3 BucketPolicies do not use Effect:Allow with NotPrincipal

title: S3 Default Encryption KMS Enabled
description: Checks whether the Amazon S3 buckets are encrypted with AWS Key Management Service(AWS KMS). The rule is NON_COMPLIANT if the Amazon S3 bucket is not encrypted with AWS KMS key.

title: SageMaker Endpoint Configuration KMS Key Configured
description: Checks whether AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key is configured for an Amazon SageMaker endpoint configuration.

title: SageMaker Notebook Instance KMS Key Configured
description: Checks whether AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key is configured for an Amazon SageMaker notebook instance.

title: SageMaker Notebook Direct Internet Access Disabled
description: Checks whether AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key is configured for an Amazon SageMaker endpoint configuration.

title: SNS Topic KMS Encryption Enabled
description: Checks if Amazon SNS topic is encrypted with AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS)

title: SNS Topic Policy No Allow Plus NotAction
description: Checks that SIMPLE NOTIFICATION SERVICE (SNS) TOPIC Policy do not use Allow+NotAction

title: SNS Topic Policy No Allow Plus NotPrincipal
description: Checks that Amazon SNS TopicPolicies do not use Effect:Allow with NotPrincipal

title: SNS Topic Policy No Wildcard Principals
description: SNS Topic policy should not allow * principal

title: SQS Queue KMS Master Key Required
description: SQS Queue should specify KmsMasterKeyId property

title: SQS Queue Policy No Allow Plus NotAction
description: Checks that SIMPLE QUEUE SERVICE (SQS) Queue Policy do not use Allow+NotAction

title: SQS Queue Policy No Allow Plus NotPrincipal
description: Checks that Amazon SQS Queue Policies do not use Effect:Allow with NotPrincipal

title: SQS Queue Policy No Wildcard Actions
description: SQS Queue policy should not allow * action

title: SQS Queue Policy No Wildcard Principals
description: SQS Queue policy should not allow * principal

title: WorkSpace Encryption Enabled
description: Workspace should have encryption enabled

title: API Gateway Cache Enabled and Encrypted
description: Checks that all methods in Amazon API Gateway stages have cache enabled and cache encrypted.

title: API Gateway Domain Deny Non-TLS Traffic
description: All API GW Domain Name Resources must deny non-TLS traffic

title: API Gateway Endpoint Type Check
description: Checks if Amazon API Gateway APIs are of the type specified in the rule parameter endpointConfigurationType

title: API Gateway Execution Logging Enabled
description: Checks that all methods in Amazon API Gateway stage has logging enabled. The rule is NON_COMPLIANT if logging is not enabled.

title: API Gateway Method Authorization Type Check
description: AWS::ApiGateway::Method should not have AuthorizationType set to 'NONE' unless it is of HttpMethod: OPTIONS.

title: API Gateway Stage Access Logging Enabled
description: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage should have the AccessLogSetting property defined.

title: API Gateway V2 Access Logs Enabled
description: Amazon API Gateway V2 stages have access logging enabled.

title: Batch Job Container Privileged Mode Disabled
description: Batch Job Definition Container Properties should not have Privileged set to true

title: CloudFormation No Explicit Resource Names
description: Checks that the template does not explicitely name resources.

title: Cognito Unauthenticated Identities Disabled
description: AWS::Cognito::IdentityPool AllowUnauthenticatedIdentities property should be false. But CAN be true if proper restrictive IAM roles and permissions are established for unauthenticated users.

title: Cognito User Pool MFA Configuration Enabled
description: AWS Cognito UserPool should have MfaConfiguration set to 'ON' (MUST be wrapped in quotes) or at least 'OPTIONAL.

title: DLM Lifecycle Policy Cross-Region Encryption
description: DLM LifecyclePolicy PolicyDetails Actions CrossRegionCopy EncryptionConfiguration should enable Encryption.

title: DMS No Plaintext Passwords
description: DMS Endpoint password must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: DMS Replication Not Public
description: Checks whether AWS Database Migration Service replication instances are not set to allow public.

title: ECR Repository Scan on Push Enabled
description: ECR Repository should have ScanOnPush enabled.

title: GameLift Fleet Inbound Port Range Restricted
description: GameLift fleet EC2InboundPermissions found with port range instead of just a single port

title: Kendra Index KMS Encryption Key Required
description: Kendra Index ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration should specify a KmsKeyId value.

title: Kinesis Firehose Delivery Stream Encryption
description: Kinesis Firehose DeliveryStream of type DirectPut should specify SSE.

title: Kinesis Firehose Redshift No Plaintext Password
description: Kinesis Firehose Redshift Destination Configuration password must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager/ssm-secure value. with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: Kinesis Firehose Splunk No Plaintext Password
description: Kinesis Firehose Splunk Destination Configuration password must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager/ssm-secure value. with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: Kinesis Stream Encryption Enabled
description: Kinesis Stream should specify StreamEncryption. EncryptionType should be KMS and specify KMS Key Id.

title: KMS Key Rotation Enabled
description: Key rotation should be enabled for KMS

title: KMS No Wildcard Principals
description: KMS key should not allow * principal

title: Microsoft AD No Plaintext Passwords
description: Directory Service Microsoft AD password must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager/ssm-secure value. with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: WAF Web ACL Default Action Not Allow
description: WebAcl DefaultAction should not be ALLOW.

title: CloudFront Access Logs Enabled
description: Checks if Amazon CloudFront Distributions are configured with access logging.

title: CloudFront Custom SSL Certificate
description: Checks if Amazon CloudFront distributions are associated with either WAF or WAFv2 web access control lists (ACLs).

title: CloudFront Default Root Object Configured
description: Checks if an Amazon CloudFront distribution is configured to return a specific object that is the default root object.

title: CloudFront Minimum Protocol Version TLS 1.2
description: Cloudfront should use minimum protocol version TLS 1.2.

title: CloudFront Origin Access Identity Enabled
description: Checks if Amazon CloudFront distributions backed by S3 are configured with an Origin Access Identity (OAI).

title: CloudFront Origin Failover Enabled
description: Checks if Amazon CloudFront Distribution is configured with an Origin Group that contains two Origin Group Members.

title: CloudFront SNI Enabled
description: Checks if Amazon CloudFront distributions are configured to use SNI to serve HTTPS requests.

title: CloudFront Viewer Policy HTTPS
description: Checks whether your Amazon CloudFront distributions use HTTPS (directly or via a redirection).

title: CloudTrail CloudWatch Logs Enabled
description: Checks whether AWS CloudTrail trails are configured to send logs to Amazon CloudWatch logs. The trail is non-compliant if the CloudWatchLogsLogGroupArn property of the trail is empty.

title: CloudTrail Enabled
description: Checks if AWS CloudTrail is enabled.

title: CloudTrail Encryption Enabled
description: Checks if AWS CloudTrail is configured to use the server side encryption (SSE) AWS Key Management Service KMS key encryption.

title: CloudTrail Log File Validation Enabled
description: Checks whether AWS CloudTrail creates a signed digest file with logs.

title: CloudTrail S3 Data Events Enabled
description: Checks whether at least one AWS CloudTrail trail is logging Amazon S3 data events for all S3 buckets.

title: Multi-Region CloudTrail Enabled
description: Checks if there is at least one multi-region AWS CloudTrail.

title: CloudWatch Alarm Action Check
description: Checks whether CloudWatch alarms have at least one alarm action, one Insufficient Data Actions action, or one OK action enabled.

title: CloudWatch Log Group Encrypted
description: Checks if a log group in Amazon CloudWatch Logs is encrypted with a AWS Key Management Service (KMS) managed Customer Master Keys (CMK).

title: CloudWatch Log Group Retention Period Check
description: Checks whether Amazon CloudWatch LogGroup retention period is set to specific number of days.

title: CodeBuild Encryption Key Required
description: CodeBuild project should specify an EncryptionKey value

title: CodeBuild Project AWS Credentials Check
description: Checks whether the project contains environment variables AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

title: CodeBuild Project Source Repository URL Check
description: Checks whether the GitHub or Bitbucket source repository URL contains either personal access tokens or user name and password.

title: DAX Encryption Enabled
description: Checks whether the GitHub or Bitbucket source repository URL contains either personal access tokens or user name and password.

title: DynamoDB Billing Mode Configured
description: DynamoDB table should have billing mode set to either PAY_PER_REQUEST or PROVISIONED.

title: DynamoDB Point-in-Time Recovery Enabled
description: All DynamoDB Tables must have Point-In-Time-Recovery enabled.

title: DynamoDB Table KMS Encryption Enabled
description: Checks if Amazon DynamoDB table is encrypted with AWS Key Management Service (KMS).

title: DynamoDB Table KMS Encryption Enabled
description: All DynamoDB Tables must have SEE enabled

title: ELB ACM Certificate Required
description: This rule checks whether the Classic Load Balancer uses HTTPS/SSL certificates provided by AWS Certificate Manager (ACM). The rule will FAIL if the Classic Load Balancer configured with HTTPS/SSL listener does not use a certificate provided by ACM.

title: ELB Cross-Zone Load Balancing Enabled
description: This rule will check to see if cross-zone load balancing is enabled for the Classic Load Balancer.

title: ELB Logging Enabled
description: This rule checks whether Classic Load Balancers have logging enabled.

title: ELB Predefined Security Policy SSL Check
description: This rule checks whether Classic Load Balancers HTTPS/SSL listeners use the predefined security policy 'ELBSecurityPolicy-TLS-1-2-2017-01'.

title: ELB TLS HTTPS Listeners Only
description: This rule checks whether Classic Load Balancer listeners are configured with HTTPS or SSL protocol for front-end (client to load balancer).

title: ALB HTTP Drop Invalid Header Enabled
description: Checks if rule evaluates AWS Application Load Balancers (ALB) to ensure they are configured to drop http headers.

title: ELB Deletion Protection Enabled
description: This rule will check to see if cross-zone load balancing is enabled for the Classic Load Balancer.

title: ELB V2 Access Logging Enabled
description: Elastic Load Balancer V2 should have access logging enabled

title: ELB V2 ACM Certificate Required
description: Checks if Application Load Balancers and Network Load Balancer HTTPS or TLS listeners are configured to use certificates from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM)

title: ELB V2 Listener Protocol HTTPS
description: Elastic Load Balancer V2 Listener Protocol should use HTTPS for ALBs

title: ELB V2 Listener SSL Policy TLS 1.2
description: Elastic Load Balancer V2 Listener SslPolicy should use TLS 1.2

title: ElastiCache Replication Group Encryption at Rest
description: ElastiCache ReplicationGroup should have encryption enabled for at rest

title: ElastiCache Replication Group Encryption in Transit
description: ElastiCache ReplicationGroup should have encryption enabled for in transit

title: IAM Managed Policy No Full Access Statements
description: Checks if AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) managed policies grant permissions to all actions on individual AWS resources.

title: IAM No Inline Policy Check
description: Checks that inline policy feature is not in use.

title: IAM No Policy on User
description: Checks that IAM Policies are not attached to IAM Users

title: IAM Policy No Admin Access Statements
description: Checks the IAM policies that you create for Allow statements that grant permissions to all actions on all resources.

title: IAM Policy No Full Access Statements
description: Checks if AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) policies grant permissions to all actions on individual AWS resources.

title: IAM Policy No Wildcard Resource on PassRole
description: IAM policy should not allow * resource with PassRole action on its permissions policy

title: IAM Policy Document No Wildcard Resource
description: Checks that no IAM Role in-line policies use resource: "*"

title: IAM Role Administrator Access Policy Disabled
description: IAM role should not have AdministratorAccess policy

title: IAM Role Elevated Managed Policy Disabled
description: IAM role should not have Elevated Managed policy

title: IAM Role Trust Policy No Allow Plus NotAction
description: Checks that IDENTITY ACCESS MANAGEMENT (IAM) Role do not use Allow+NotAction on Trust Policy

title: IAM Role Trust Policy No Allow Plus NotPrincipal
description: Checks that AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) roles do not use Allow+NotPrincipal in its trust policy

title: IAM Role Trust Policy No Full Access
description: Checks if AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) roles grant permissions to all actions in the trust policy.

title: IAM Role Permissions No Wildcard Actions
description: Checks if AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) roles grant Action "*" in it's permission policy.

title: IAM Role Permissions No Wildcard Resource on PassRole
description: IAM role should not allow * resource with PassRole action on its permissions policy

title: IAM Role or Policy No Allow Plus NotAction
description: Checks that AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) roles do not use Allow+NotAction

title: IAM Role or Policy No Allow Plus NotResource
description: Checks that AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) roles do not use Allow+NotResource

title: IAM User Login Profile No Plaintext Password
description: IAM User LoginProfile password must not be a plaintext string or a Ref to a Parameter with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager/ssm-secure value. with a Default value. Can be Ref to a NoEcho Parameter without a Default, or a dynamic reference to a secretsmanager value.

title: IAM User Login Profile Password Reset Required
description: IAM User Login Profile should exist and have PasswordResetRequired property set to true.

title: IAM User Missing Group Assignment
description: IAM User is not assigned to a group.

title: IAM User No Policies Check
description: Checks that none of your IAM users have policies attached. IAM users must inherit permissions from IAM groups or roles.

title: Lambda Concurrency Check
description: Checks whether the AWS Lambda function is configured with function-level concurrent execution limit.

title: Lambda Dead Letter Queue Check
description: Checks whether an AWS Lambda function is configured with a dead-letter queue.

title: Lambda Function Public Access Prohibited
description: Checks if the AWS Lambda function policy attached to the Lambda resource prohibits public access.

title: Lambda Inside VPC
description: Checks whether an AWS Lambda function is allowed access to an Amazon Virtual Private Cloud.

title: Lambda No Wildcard Principals
description: Checks if the AWS Lambda permission uses open principal

title: Lambda Permission Invoke Function Action Only
description: Checks if the AWS Lambda permission uses any other action apart from 'lambda:InvokeFunction'

title: Elasticsearch Application Logging Enabled
description: Elasticsearch domains are are configured to send application logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs

title: Elasticsearch Audit Logging Enabled
description: Elasticsearch domains are are configured to send audit logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs

title: Elasticsearch Data Node Fault Tolerance
description: Elasticsearch domains are configured with at least three data nodes and zone awareness enabled.

title: Elasticsearch Encrypted at Rest
description: Elasticsearch domains must enforce server side encryption

title: Elasticsearch HTTPS Required
description: Elasticsearch domains are configured to require HTTPS with a minimum TLS version of TLSv1.2

title: Elasticsearch In VPC Only
description: Elasticsearch domains must be in a VPC

title: Elasticsearch Logs to CloudWatch
description: Checks if Amazon OpenSearch Service (OpenSearch Service) domains are configured to send logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

title: Elasticsearch Node-to-Node Encryption Check
description: Elasticsearch domains must enforce Node-to-Node Encryption

title: Elasticsearch Primary Node Fault Tolerance
description: Elasticsearch domains are configured with at least three dedicated primary nodes

title: OpenSearch Access Control Enabled
description: OpenSearchService domains are are configured with fine-grained access control enabled

title: OpenSearch Application Logging Enabled
description: OpenSearchService domains are are configured to send application logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs

title: OpenSearch Audit Logging Enabled
description: OpenSearchService domains are are configured to send audit logs to Amazon CloudWatch Logs

title: OpenSearch Data Node Fault Tolerance
description: OpenSearchService domains are configured with at least three data nodes and zone awareness enabled.

title: OpenSearch Encrypted at Rest
description: OpenSearchService domains must enforce server side encryption

title: OpenSearch HTTPS Required
description: OpenSearchService domains are configured to require HTTPS with a minimum TLS version of TLSv1.2

title: OpenSearch In VPC Only
description: OpenSearchService domains must be in a VPC

title: OpenSearch Node-to-Node Encryption Check
description: OpenSearchService domains must enforce Node-to-Node Encryption

title: Secrets Manager Rotation Enabled Check
description: Checks if AWS Secrets Manager secret has rotation enabled.

title: Secrets Manager Using Customer Managed Key
description: Checks if all secrets in AWS Secrets Manager are encrypted using a customer managed key that was created in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS).
